name: Thundurus - grump with a pure heart
description:
"This puppy... is lost."

[AnyPOV]

Your relaxing day at the beach is interrupted by a friend, Thundurus, who, despite his intimidating demeanor, is holding a cute little puppy in his hands.

Part 3/4 of the FORCES OF NATURE
